preconditions: Navigate to the exact URL http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify home_page is loaded in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting each independent test scenario.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after navigation from home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the person/profile button.
Observe the Login page controls.
testCases.expectedResult: The Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and enabled for interaction on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters during credential entry
steps: Navigate from home_page to the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click inside the Password field.
Type the value Carwash#1 into the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field displays masked characters instead of the plain text password value while input is being entered.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication using approved credentials returns user to authenticated home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home and confirm guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to home_page in authenticated state, and authenticated-only UI and authenticated user identity indicators become visible.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username with valid password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page from the person/profile button.
Enter invaliduser in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the application remains unauthenticated on the Login page or in unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify valid username with invalid password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page from the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter WrongPassword#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no authenticated-only UI is shown, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and invalid password combination cannot authenticate
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Enter invaliduser in the Username field.
Enter invalidpassword in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, the generic Failed message is displayed, the user is not redirected to authenticated home_page state, and no dedicated required-field validation message is shown.

testCases.title: Verify blank username and blank password submission displays generic Failed message only
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Leave the Username and Password fields empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message is displayed, and the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify blank username with populated password displays generic Failed message only
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation is shown, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify populated username with blank password displays generic Failed message only
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation is shown, and the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify username with leading whitespace follows implemented authentication behavior observationally
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Enter value with leading whitespace before the approved username in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes the whitespace-modified credentials according to implemented behavior, and the resulting authentication state, navigation behavior, and any Failed message visibility are observable without assuming automatic trimming or rejection.

testCases.title: Verify username with trailing whitespace follows implemented authentication behavior observationally
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Enter the approved username with trailing whitespace in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes the trailing-whitespace username according to implemented behavior, and the resulting authenticated or failed state is observable without assuming normalization.

testCases.title: Verify password with leading whitespace follows implemented authentication behavior observationally
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter the approved password with leading whitespace in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes the whitespace-modified password according to implemented behavior, and the resulting authentication outcome and navigation state are observable without assuming trimming behavior.

testCases.title: Verify password with trailing whitespace follows implemented authentication behavior observationally
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter the approved password with trailing whitespace in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes the trailing-whitespace password according to implemented behavior, and the resulting authentication state and Failed message behavior are observable without assuming rejection or normalization.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only username and password submission remains unauthenticated
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Username field.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Login page Back button returns guest user to home_page without authentication
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click the Back button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state without exposing authenticated-only UI.

testCases.title: Verify Login page Home button returns guest user to home_page without authentication
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click the Home button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state and authenticated-only functionality remains unavailable.
